name: Founder Operations Workspace
description: Five AI ops hires for solo founders — a Head of Operations that owns the shared operating-context doc, a Vendor & Procurement Ops specialist (contracts, renewals, suppliers, compliance, SaaS spend), an Executive Assistant (calendar, meeting prep, follow-ups, travel), a Data Analyst (business metrics, experiments, anomalies, dashboards), and a Chief of Staff (board packs, investor updates, decision logs, OKRs, bottleneck hunts). Chat-first, markdown-output, tool-agnostic via Composio. HR and finance are separate verticals.
